mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_ATTACHMENT ( BOARD_ID, FILE_UUID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, UPLOADER_ID ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{fileUuid}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploaderId} )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID AS "fileId", BOARD_ID AS "boardId", FILE_UUID AS "fileUuid", FILE_NAME AS "fileName", FILE_PATH AS "filePath", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", UPLOAD_DATE AS "uploadDate", UPLOADER_ID AS "uploaderId" FROM FILE_ATTACHMENT WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY FILE_ID ASC

SELECT FILE_ID AS "fileId", BOARD_ID AS "boardId", FILE_UUID AS "fileUuid", FILE_NAME AS "fileName", FILE_PATH AS "filePath", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", UPLOAD_DATE AS "uploadDate", UPLOADER_ID AS "uploaderId" FROM FILE_ATTACHMENT WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
